title: 300+ military drones & Iran links: Did Cuba plan a strike on US naval base?
content: US intelligence suggests Cuba has acquired over 300 military drones, raising security concerns about potential attacks on American targets like Guantanamo Bay and Key West. CIA chief visited Havana, warning against hostilities and urging an end to its "totalitarian government." Cuba denies threatening war, asserting its right to self-defense amid growing defense ties with Russia and Iran.

title: Noida ‘dowry’ death: Kin refuse last rites as accused husband remains absconding
content: A Bhopal woman's family protested, demanding a fresh post-mortem in Delhi after her death, alleging dowry harassment. Police formed a Special Investigation Team to probe the husband, a lawyer, and his former judge mother. The family claims the woman, from Noida, was murdered. Legal proceedings are sought to be moved out of Madhya Pradesh.

title: Ratlam’s Rajdhani deja vu: Two train fires, same place in Madhya Pradesh
content: Ratlam, Madhya Pradesh, witnessed a second Rajdhani train fire on May 17, 2026, mirroring an incident from April 18, 2011. Both blazes, occurring near Ratlam's railway division, thankfully resulted in no casualties, with passengers safely evacuated. While the 2026 fire caused limited damage, these recurring events place Ratlam in an unfortunate spotlight on the Rajdhani network.

title: IPL Playoffs: With 8 games to go, RCB officially qualify; DC’s chances rise to 19.5%
content: With eight games remaining, LSG and MI are out of playoff contention. RCB has qualified. GT are assured of a top-four points finish but could miss out. SRH have a high chance of making the top four. CSK and RR have less than even chances for the top four. PBKS, DC, and KKR's playoff hopes are diminishing.

title: Salesforce CEO who halted hiring sees company spending millions on Anthropic tokens
content: Salesforce is significantly boosting AI spending, projecting hundreds of millions on Anthropic tokens, while halting software engineer hiring. CEO Marc Benioff highlights AI's role in enhancing engineer productivity by over 30%, enabling faster output and lower development costs. This strategic shift reflects a broader tech trend of leveraging AI for efficiency, with humans still integral to operations.

title: 'Dangerous escalation': India expresses concern after Iranian drones target UAE nuclear facility
content: India expressed deep concern over Iranian drone attacks targeting the Barakah nuclear facility in the UAE, calling it a dangerous escalation. The strike, which caused a fire near an electrical generator but no injuries or leaks, has intensified regional tensions. The UAE condemned the act as unprovoked and a threat to its sovereignty.

title: RJ Mahvash breaks silence on Chahal relationship rumours after unfollow drama
content: RJ Mahvash addressed social media speculation about her relationship with Yuzvendra Chahal, clarifying that unfollowing each other on Instagram stemmed from a minor disagreement. She emphasized that such actions are common among friends and do not signify deeper issues, highlighting her loyalty and support for Chahal during his past mental health struggles.

title: From July 10, US can deny your visa for this one reason
content: USCIS now has the power to reject or deny immigration applications, even keeping fees, if an invalid signature is found months or years later. This new rule, effective July 10, 2026, applies broadly to most benefit requests, including visas and Green Cards. Applicants cannot usually fix signature errors after submission.

title: Top stocks to buy: Stock recommendations for this week - check list
content: Stock market recommendations: Motilal Oswal Wealth Management Research Desk recommends picking up Syrma SGS, and Max Financials as the top stocks for the trading week starting May 18, 2026:

title: IPL 2026: Will MS Dhoni play today in CSK's final home game of the season?
content: MS Dhoni's potential appearance at Chepauk for Chennai Super Kings' final home game against Sunrisers Hyderabad has ignited fan anticipation.  The veteran wicketkeeper's recent net session, where he confidently faced spinners and hit sixes, has fueled speculation about his availability. This crucial match holds significant weight for CSK's playoff hopes and could be Dhoni's last T20 at home.

title: Palantir’s top exec says SaaS is dead, but not software engineering
content: A Palantir executive has declared the traditional Software as a Service (SaaS) model dead, attributing its demise to generative AI.  AI tools now enable rapid, cost-effective creation of highly customized corporate software, replacing lengthy, expensive traditional development.  This shift empowers engineers to build bespoke solutions on the spot, with AI also handling complex tasks like testing and compliance monitoring.

title: How four US Navy pilots survived horrific mid-air fighter jet collision
content: Two US Navy fighter jets collided mid-air during an Idaho air show, a rare incident where all four pilots miraculously ejected safely before the aircraft exploded. Dramatic footage captured the crews' escape moments before impact. Aviation experts suggest the unique nature of the collision might have provided the crucial extra seconds needed for survival. The cause is under investigation.

title: IPL 2026: How Delhi Capitals can still qualify for playoffs after RR win
content: Delhi Capitals' playoff hopes hang by a thread after a crucial win. They need to win their final game and rely on a complex web of results from other teams, including losses for Chennai Super Kings and Rajasthan Royals. A significant net run rate improvement is also essential, making their qualification path incredibly narrow and demanding.

title: Roger Federer and Mirka Federer combined net worth 2026
content: By 2026, Roger Federer and Mirka Federer’s combined net worth will be one of the largest financial empires among athletes in sports history. The wealth has been built up by ATP prize money, record-breaking endorsement deals and strategic investments like On Running, showing the enduring brand power of tennis. Lifestyle management, family operations, and business direction are also big players in the game, along with Roger Federer and Mirka Federer.

title: Andre Agassi and Steffi Graf combined net worth 2026
content: Steffi Graf and Andre Agassi are a very recognizable tennis pair, and they have an estimated net worth in 2026 of $290 million. They’ve become wealthy by winning Grand Slams, signing multiyear contracts and other investments. Both benefited from the brand equity, business pursuits and financial planning that they developed during and after their successful professional tennis careers.

title: FIFA 2026 World Cup row erupts as fans demand BTS removal from Jungkook song
content: Fans are criticizing BigHit Music after BTS was reportedly credited on Jungkook’s solo FIFA World Cup song Dreamers. Many argued that Jungkook alone created and performed the track, calling the move unfair to his solo achievements. The backlash grew amid fresh buzz about BTS potentially performing at the 2026 FIFA World Cup halftime show, reigniting conversations about solo recognition, group branding, and BigHit’s marketing strategy surrounding Jungkook’s global success.

title: Oil prices jump 2% after UAE nuclear plant attack amid 80-day Hormuz closure
content: Oil prices surged over 2% on Monday, driven by escalating Middle East tensions and stalled de-escalation efforts. Reports of a nuclear power plant attack and potential US military options against Iran further unsettled markets. Both Brent and WTI crude saw significant gains, continuing a sharp rally from the previous week.

title: Heatwave forces extended summer vacations across states; check state-wise schedule
content: Several Indian states, including Delhi, Uttar Pradesh, Haryana and Rajasthan, have announced extended summer school holidays due to severe heatwave conditions and IMD warnings of rising temperatures through June. Schools across CBSE, ICSE, private and government boards have revised schedules or shifted to morning classes to protect students from extreme heat. The report also explains why many children struggle returning to school after long holidays, citing disrupted routines, academic pressure, altered sleep schedules and attachment to leisure activities.

title: Bharti Airtel, Cipla & more: Top stocks to watch today
content: Jefferies raised Bharti Airtel's target price to Rs 2,350 on strong Q4FY26 performance, while JP Morgan upgraded Cipla to overweight citing improved earnings visibility and attractive valuations. Morgan Stanley maintained an underweight rating on Dixon Technologies due to revenue and EBITDA misses, and HDFC Securities upgraded Hyundai Motor India to add, noting management's renewed focus on domestic growth and exports.

title: Bengaluru road rage: Two threaten architect for honking, attack husband with stone
content: A road rage incident escalated violently near Doddaballapur when an architect honked at an MUV. The occupants allegedly threatened her and then assaulted her husband when he intervened. Police arrested two farmers, who were reportedly intoxicated, on charges including attempted murder. Another separate road rage incident involving a biker and a BMTC driver was also reported.

title: Trump-Xi summit: Taiwan absent from White House China visit summary amid Iran, trade focus
content: US President Trump's China visit yielded trade and investment pacts, including Boeing aircraft and agricultural deals. Both nations agreed on Iran's nuclear non-proliferation and Strait of Hormuz access. Notably, Taiwan, a key discussion point, was omitted from the White House fact sheet, despite Trump hinting at reconsidering arms sales.

title: Watch: Preity Zinta’s tense chat with Shreyas, Ponting’s dejected look sum up PBKS collapse
content: Punjab Kings suffered their sixth consecutive loss in IPL 2026 against Royal Challengers Bengaluru. This defeat has severely impacted their playoff chances. Royal Challengers Bengaluru secured a playoff spot with a strong performance. Punjab Kings' captain Shreyas Iyer acknowledged the match was lost early in the powerplay. The team's confidence appears shaken as their early season dominance has vanished.

title: Karnataka shocker: Man murders 17-year-old daughter over choice of groom
content: A father in Tumakuru murdered his 17-year-old daughter over her choice of groom, then faked his own disappearance. He drowned her in a farm well and buried her body. Police, alerted by a friend, apprehended the man who was seeking anticipatory bail, finally solving the month-long mystery.

title: NFL Trade Rumor: Kansas City Chiefs linked to former $63M New England Patriots star
content: The Kansas City Chiefs recorded a brutal run on the field in the last season after a Super Bowl LIX lost against the Philadelphia Eagles in the 2024 season, sparking major concern about the team's decline in form. The major losses have sparked concern among many as all eyes remain on the upcoming season’s roster. Amid all the mess, the Kansas City Chiefs have been linked to a veteran wide receiver.

title: Trump’s Truth Social spree features aliens, space warfare and Iran strike memes
content: As tensions with Iran escalated and nuclear talks stalled, Donald Trump flooded Truth Social with AI-generated images featuring aliens, missile strikes and space warfare. The US President shared around 25 posts, including maps targeting Iran and military-themed memes, while warning Tehran that “time is of the essence”. Iran rejected Washington’s conditions and demanded sanctions relief before negotiations could resume.

title: Boost for tech, trade & defence as India, Sweden become ‘strategic partners’
content: India and Sweden have elevated their ties to a strategic partnership, signing an action plan for 2026-2030 covering green transition, technology, trade, and defence. Prime Minister Modi emphasized shared democratic values and innovation, highlighting growing defence cooperation moving beyond a buyer-seller dynamic. Discussions also explored strengthening supply chains and sustainable mobility.

title: 'Sooryavanshi hasn’t continued as much as we’d like': RR coach on conversion issues
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is electrifying IPL 2026 with his aggressive opening batting for Rajasthan Royals. He has set a new record for most sixes by an Indian in a single IPL season with 43. Coach Kumar Sangakkara emphasizes the youngster's impact and natural approach, focusing on his fearless intent over conversion rates.

title: Fossil-fuelled growth: India home to over 35% of world's 'dirtier & richer' cities
content: As India navigates rapid urbanization, it faces a pressing crisis: approximately 35% of the world's most polluted affluent cities are located here. While major metropolitan areas are making strides towards cleaner urban living, numerous smaller cities continue to depend on fossil fuels for transportation, manufacturing, and energy.

title: IPL: Riyan Parag’s late gamble backfires as Capitals stay alive with win over RR
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi smashed his way to a new IPL record for sixes by an Indian batter. Despite his explosive start, Rajasthan Royals could not reach a commanding total. Delhi Capitals chased well initially but also lost wickets. In a tense finish, Delhi Capitals secured a home win, breaking their losing streak.

title: Delhi high court transfers district judge over 'objectionable' conduct
content: In an unexpected turn of events, Judge Rakesh Kumar V. has left the Rohini court amidst controversy involving the president of the Rohini Court Bar Association. Lawyers raised alarms over his purported misconduct during legal proceedings, prompting the Delhi High Court to intervene and reassign him to the Judicial Academy. Dhiraj Mittal is set to take on his former responsibilities.

title: Police turn heat on Union minister Bandi Sanjay’s son, add ‘repeated rape’ charge
content: Cyberabad Police have added a serious charge of repeated rape under the new Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita against Bandi Sai Bageerath, son of Union minister Bandi Sanjay, in a Pocso case. He was remanded to judicial custody until May 29. Other charges related to outraging modesty and sexual harassment remain. Bageerath surrendered to police after being on the run.

title: 'Karuppu' BO day 3: Suriya and Trisha Krishnan starrer crosses Rs 120.75 crore worldwide
content: Suriya's latest venture, 'Karuppu,' has taken the cinematic world by storm, accumulating an impressive Rs 120.75 crore globally during its debut weekend. Directed by the talented RJ Balaji and featuring Trisha Krishnan, this mythological action epic saw a notable boost in box office numbers as the weekend progressed.

title: Weather & then war lead to tears in India’s onion basket
content: Maharashtra's onion farmers face devastating losses as prices plummet far below production costs. A combination of bumper harvests, weak demand, export disruptions, and unseasonal rains has led to crops rotting and farmers selling at a significant deficit. Many are demanding government intervention and compensation for their distress.

title: Kharif output dips by over 10% across states in El Niño years: Study
content: El Niño's shadow looms over India's monsoon. Past El Niño years saw key kharif crops like paddy and maize suffer over 10% output reduction in numerous districts. This study highlights vulnerable areas and stresses the need for district-level climate-resilient planning. Policymakers are urged to strengthen contingency plans for drought-tolerant varieties and efficient water management to protect farmers.

title: Kerala swearing-in ceremony LIVE: Satheesan, along with Cabinet, to take oath today
content: A day before his swearing-in,Chief Minister-designate V.D. Satheesan unveiled the 20-member Council of Ministers of the Congress-led UDF government

title: Philanthropy in Asia emerging as ‘risk capital’ for social innovation: Report
content: Tata Trusts-backed digital inclusion platform Haqdarshak is under the government’s Digital India initiative to improve access to welfare schemes.

title: Trade, energy, discussions on global conflicts to top agenda for Modi’s Nordic visit
content: First Indian Prime Minister’s bilateral visit in 43 years, first Nordic summit since 2022 to kick off this week in Oslo.

title: NEET UG leak: CBI conducts searches at Renukai Chemistry Classes in Latur
content: CBI officials began the search at Renukai Chemistry Classes in the city’s Shivnagar locality in the afternoon, and it was still underway till late evening

title: Satheesan names 20 Ministers; Kerala Cabinet to take oath on May 18
content: Of the 63 Congress MLAs in the 102-strong UDF contingent, many eligible names could not be given Ministerial berths as the party had to consider social and regional equations, V.D. Satheesan said

title: In Bihar, a plate of woe
content: A week after a suspected snake was found in a midday meal, students in Bihar’s Saharsa district remain too scared to eat lunch at school. Even as teachers, cooks, and education officials insist the food is safe, fear continues to linger among the children and their parents

title: India, Sweden agree to elevate ties to Strategic Partnership
content: During the delegation-level talks, Narendra Modi and Ulf Kristersson reviewed the full spectrum of India-Sweden relations and agreed to elevate the bilateral relationship to a Strategic Partnership

title: Di Giannantonio wins Catalan Grand Prix, Alex Marquez hurt in horror crash
content: The race was red-flagged twice, the first time after Pedro Acosta’s bike cut out and Marquez made contact with him, with his Ducati-Gresini destroyed in a horrific crash

title: India, Sweden agree to elevate bilateral ties to Strategic Partnership | highlights
content: Sweden confers Royal Order of Polar Star upon PM Modi; it is the 31st global honour for Prime Minister Narendra Modi

title: With CM and three Ministers, Ernakulam gets strong representation in Cabinet
content: Angamaly MLA Roji M. John of the Congress, Piravom legislator Anoop Jacob of Kerala Congress (Jacob), and Kalamassery MLA V. E. Abdul Gafoor of the Indian Union Muslim League will be sworn in as Ministers

title: E-buses will not lead to privatisation of RTC, says top official
content: The government is commitment to providing safe, affordable, efficient and environment-friendly transport services to the people through APSRTC and fully protecting the interests of its employees, says Krishna Babu, Special Chief Secretary, Transport

title: RTC employees’ union opposes privatisation move
content: Accusing the government of trying to hand over valuable assets and operations to private companies in the name of electric bus services, it calls for a round-table with various trade unions in Vijayawada on May 26 to decide the future course of action

title: New Bengaluru–Mumbai Express flagged off; Vande Bharat sleeper service soon
content: Railway Minister says around 1,750 km of new railway lines have been constructed in Karnataka since 2014

title: Vijayawada GGH officials probing why biomedical waste room was kept unlocked
content: There have been internal disputes within the hospital and some outsourcing staff might have conspired in the incident, allege GGH staff

title: Anagha from Tirthahalli emerges State topper in SSLC after revaluation
content: Anagha, daughter of Shivakumar and Mangala, both teachers, had scored 100% in every subject except Social Science, where she received 99

title: Mysuru: Jackfruit festival concludes with a call to conserve indigenous varieties
content: The organisers said the two-day jackfruit festival successfully attracted large crowds, with more than 6,000 visitors attending the fair.

title: I did not try to broker a deal between DMK and AIADMK: Rajinikanth
content: Rajinikanth asked how he could harbour envy against Mr. Vijay when there is a big generation gap between them

title: Decision on letters submitted by both groups of AIADMK MLAs will be taken at appropriate time: J.C.D. Prabhakar
content: The Speaker says no specific time limit has been stipulated in Assembly Rules or law for taking a decision on letters submitted to the Speaker. He inspects playgrounds in his Thousand Lights constituency

title: Woman stripped, paraded with slipper garland after temple entry dispute; two women arrested
content: Assault took place after a youth from the victim’s family defied a caste panchayat’s ban on the family entering the local temple; videos show bystanders watching and recording on mobile phones

title: Congress leader slams Andhra Pradesh CM’s population growth incentive
content: Despite southern States’ fear of losing political representation due to their declining population, incentivising families to have more babies is the wrong approach, says former RS MP Husain Dalwai

title: Throwing non-veg food waste in Ganga could hurt religious sentiments: Allahabad HC on iftar party row
content: The FIR was lodged on March 16 based on a complaint filed by Rajat Jaiswal, the president of the Varanasi chapter of the BJP Yuva Morcha, claiming that the incident hurt the sentiments of the Hindus.

title: High-level inquiry committee set up to probe fire in Rajdhani Express: Railway Board
content: The fire erupted at 5.15 a.m. in the B-1 passenger coach of the train between Vikramgarh Alot and Lunirichha stations under the Kota Railway division, one-and-a-half hours after it left the Ratlam Junction in Madhya Pradesh

title: Parth Pawar meets Fadnavis amid reports of rift within NCP
content: NCP sources said the two leaders briefly discussed issues within the NCP as well. “A seat in Rajya Sabha is getting vacant. We have a few names in mind. This was also discussed,” a leader said.

title: Amaravati Amma Vanta empowering women through traditional food ventures
content: The initiative has helped create sustainable self-employment opportunities, with each entrepreneur now earning an average monthly income of around ₹12,000, says CRDA Group Director (Social Development)

title: Clashes erupt in West Bengal over prayer restrictions
content: Congress leader Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury has sought the Chief Minister’s intervention to mitigate the tensions triggered by the government’s recent guidelines on animal slaughter

title: Kerala Cabinet Formation updates: UDF finalises Kerala Cabinet list, IUML gets five ministerial posts
content: Senior Congress leader Thiruvanchoor Radhakrishnan will be Speaker of Kerala Assembly; 21-member Cabinet with CM-designate Satheesan will take oath of office on May 18

title: Ladakh administration hikes wages of skilled, unskilled workers
content: Lieutenant-Governor announced a major wage rationalisation reform for daily wagers, part-time, seasonal and need-based employees working in the Union Territory

title: Mehbooba wants Pakistan to respond ‘positively’ after Hosabale calls for talks
content: Underlining that the “solution to Kashmir lies in dialogue and within the framework of the Constitution”, Ms. Mufti said, “We believe in engagement and talks. We seek peace with dignity.”

title: Great Nicobar project a recipe for ecological disaster: Jairam Ramesh
content: The Central government has been citing strategic interests for going ahead, for which the Congress leader has suggested alternative means in a letter the Defence Minister

title: Trinamool leaders face arrests, public anger, return extorted money
content: The crackdown intensified after Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari urged people to file complaints against those who had allegedly extorted money from them during the previous Trinamool Congress regime

title: Education Ministry a department of disasters, sack Pradhan: Rahul Gandhi
content: ‘Every announcement plunges children deeper into uncertainty. Every failure goes unpunished,’ the Congress leader said

title: Centre defends on-screen marking for CBSE Class 12 answer sheets, reduces re-evaluation fee
content: Union Secretary of School Education Sanjay Kumar and CBSE Chairman Rahul Singh say the system will improve evaluation and transparency. Re-evaluation cost has been reduced to ₹100 per answer sheet

title: 6 Of A Family Among 10 Shot Dead In Mexico, Domestic Dispute Suspected
content: Six men, three women and a minor died in a shooting inside a home in the municipality of Tehuitzingo, located approximately 200 kilometers south of Mexico City

title: 'Lack Of Knowledge': India Rejects Dutch PM's Remarks On Press Freedom, Minority Rights
content: The diplomat, citing the recently held assembly elections in several regions in the country, said India is a "vibrant democracy" where "peaceful transition of power" is a key feature.

title: Global Steel Price Surge: Not India Or China, This Nation Steals The Show
content: India Steel Production: India remains one of the quickest expanding steel markets in the world within this global uptrend.

title: 4 Key Takeaways From Elon Musk's Lawsuit Against OpenAI Co-Founders
content: At the opening of the trial on April 28, Musk portrayed himself as a selfless benefactor and Good Samaritan concerned with protecting humanity from an AI that, if left in the wrong hands, could "kill us all."

title: Stock Market LIVE Updates, Sensex Today: Markets Likely To Open Lower As Trump Warns Iran 'Clock Is Ticking'
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty LIVE Updates: Brent advanced toward US$111 a barrel, after adding almost 8 per cent last week.

title: 20 Ministers In VD Satheesan Cabinet In Kerala, 14 Will Be New Faces
content: In keeping with the Centre's suggestion of responsible fuel usage, Satheesan has ordered that there be no convoy, security vehicles or ambulances. He has also said he would not require a new vehicle.

title: US Waiver On Russian Oil Ends: Will India Raise Fuel Prices Again?
content: Fuel Price Hike: India imports more than 85 per cent of its crude oil needs. Any sustained increase in oil prices directly hits inflation.

title: VD Satheesan, With 20-Member Cabinet, To Take Oath In Kerala Today
content: VD Satheesan has no administrative background. But the Chief Minister designate has already made a beginning, announcing several sweeping changes that spell an end to the financial extravagance and VIP culture in the state.

title: 'Shimla Agreement Table Stays As Reminder Of Mistakes': Himachal Governor
content: "We had split Pakistan into two. When 90,000 Pakistani soldiers surrendered before you, any demand could have been met. Mistakes were indeed made," Himachal Pradesh Governor Kavinder Gupta said

title: US Iran War News Highlights: Trump's "Clock Ticking" Threat To Iran, Tehran Readies Hormuz Traffic "Mechanism"
content: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

title: Trump Likely To Hold Key Meeting Over Military Action On Iran: Report
content: The meeting will come after Donald Trump issued a stark warning to Iran on Sunday, saying that the clock in ticking for Tehran.

title: India, Netherlands Sign Pact To Fast Track Freshwater Reservoir In Gujarat
content: To formalise this technical exchange, a Letter of Intent was signed between India's Ministry of Jal Shakti and the Netherlands' Ministry of Infrastructure and Water Management.

title: UP Cabinet Portfolios Allocated Week After Expansion: Who Got What
content: In the second expansion under Yogi Adityanath 2.0, two cabinet ministers and four state ministers were inducted into the Uttar Pradesh government on May 10.

title: 'We're Living In Horror': Family Of Noida Woman Found Dead In Bhopal To NDTV
content: Twisha Sharma's father Navnidhi Sharma and cousin brother Ashish Sharma told NDTV that they have been struggling for justice and running from pillar to post in Bhopal

title: No laughing matter: Colbert exit sparks fears for political satire in America
content: late-night television is bleeding money in the streaming age, with younger audiences migrating to social media memes, clips, and podcasts hosted by hosts broadcasting from basements and bunkers . the network insists the decision is “purely financial,” which may be true in the same way the Titanic had a “water management issue”

content: many Indian Baha’is originally came from Iran and continue to have relatives in that country . the crackdown has been ]harsh on Iranian Baha'is, the country's largest non-Muslim minority community .

title: Measles kills 450 kids in Bangladesh; probe sought into Yunus’ vax policy
content: a court order has been sought for barring former interim govt chief adviser Muhammad Yunus and 24 others from leaving the country pending completion of probe into the shortage of measles vaccines during his tenure . he is accused of having a severe shortage of vaccines between 2024 and 2025 .

title: PIO gets 14-year jail for abusing 61 women in Australia
content: australian-origin massage therapist sumit Rastogi sentenced to 13 years and 10 months in jail for sexually abusing 61 women over nine months . the 39-year-old was convicted of 97 charges of “aggravated indecent assault” and “secretly filming” the survivors . he said he showed no remorse .

title: Fire breaks out in Bihar passenger train; no casualties reported
content: The TOI News Desk comprises a dedicated and tireless team of journalists who operate around the clock to deliver the most current and comprehensive news and updates to the readers of The Times of India worldwide. With an unwavering commitment to excellence in journalism, our team is at the forefront of gathering, verifying, and presenting breaking news, in-depth analysis, and insightful reports on a wide range of topics. The TOI News Desk is your trusted source for staying informed and connected to the ever-evolving global landscape, ensuring that our readers are equipped with the latest developments that matter most."
